name: The Great Hunt
flavor: The pack gathers for a grand hunt. Gnolls compete to bring the mightiest prey and earn the title of the greatest hunter.

winner_reward.announcement: You have won The Great Hunt with a score of {}!

participation_reward.announcement: You participated in The Great Hunt. Your score: {}.

history_events.begin: The Great Hunt has begun! The best hunters compete for glory!
history_events.end: The Great Hunt has concluded. ::total_score animals were hunted. ::winner_name claimed victory!
history_events.success: The Great Hunt has concluded. ::winner_name is the greatest hunter with ::winner_score kills!
